name: MoneyGram
description_short: Columbus, WI's MoneyGram at 210 Dix St offers check cashing and money transfers open daily 8AM-10PM.
description_long:
Located at 210 Dix St in Columbus, WI, this MoneyGram location operates as a standalone check-cashing store serving the local community. The branch maintains extended hours seven days a week, opening at 8 AM and closing at 10 PM daily, making it convenient for Columbus residents to handle financial needs before or after work.

The Columbus MoneyGram location on Dix St offers check cashing, money transfers, and other financial services. You can reach them at +1 920-623-2205 to confirm specific services available or ask questions about fees before visiting.

When visiting the 210 Dix St MoneyGram in Columbus, bring a valid government-issued ID and know that the store operates consistently every day of the week. This location is useful for quick cash access and international money transfers in the Columbus area.

International remittance senders transferring money to family overseas
Consumers preferring in-person service at retail locations over digital platforms
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those sending international remittances who value accessibility through physical agent locations. Primary caveat: the provided Foursquare link contains no actual company information, only a login interface, preventing comprehensive verification of current services, fee structures, and offerings.
meta_description: MoneyGram at 210 Dix St, Columbus, WI. Check cashing and money transfers with extended daily hours.
